task_completion.description: Create a drawing page using an A4 Landscape template in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD TechDraw workbench is active. A drawing page tab is open displaying an A4 Landscape template (typically with a title block at the bottom right). The Combo View (tree view) should show a 'Page' object added to the document.

task_completion.description: Include front, top, and right-side orthographic projection views of the bracket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawing page displays three distinct 2D views of the bracket arranged in a standard orthographic projection layout (Front, Top, Right). The Combo View (tree view) should show a ProjectionGroup or multiple View objects nested under the Page.

task_completion.description: Save the document as T8_bracket_drawing.FCStd in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title or active document tab is named 'T8_bracket_drawing.FCStd', or a file manager/terminal shows this file exists in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.

task_completion.description: Export the drawing page to T8_bracket_drawing.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A PDF viewer displays the exported drawing with the three views, or a file manager/terminal shows 'T8_bracket_drawing.pdf' exists in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ with a non-zero file size.

integrity.description: The agent used FreeCAD to generate the drawing and views.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the FreeCAD GUI, specifically the TechDraw workbench tools (e.g., 'Insert Page', 'Insert View', 'Insert Projection Group'), rather than just running a pre-made script.

integrity.description: The exported PDF is genuinely generated from the FreeCAD drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The content of the PDF exactly matches the layout, template, and views seen in the FreeCAD drawing page during the agent's workflow.

integrity.description: The agent did not just create empty files to bypass checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal `ls -l` commands show the PDF file size is substantial (e.g., > 5000 bytes) and the FCStd file is properly saved, not 0 bytes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file 'T8_housing_bracket.FCStd' contains only a 3D PartDesign model with no existing TechDraw content. The agent must manually create an A4 Landscape TechDraw page, insert Front, Top, and Right orthographic views of the bracket, save the project as 'T8_bracket_drawing.FCStd', and export the page as 'T8_bracket_drawing.pdf'. Both output files must be located in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/. The PDF must be visually verifiable and have a file size greater than 5000 bytes.
